results.title: Soccer-Lampard lands England's Manager of the Year award
results.description: May 27 (Reuters) - Frank ⁠Lampard has been named England's Manager of ⁠the Year by his peers after leading ‌Coventry City back to the Premier League after a gap of a quarter of a century.

results.title: Link trực tiếp Kakeru Kumagai/Hiroki Nishi vs Ben Lane/Sean Vendy 17:20, ngày 27/05
results.description: Xem trực tuyến trận đấu Kakeru Kumagai/Hiroki Nishi vs Ben Lane/Sean Vendy sẽ được phát sóng vào lúc 17:20 giải đấu trên kênh Xoilac TV.
